allow: Bash(curl -sS -b cookie.txt -c cookie.txt -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8765/api/action -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"kind":"sonar","row":4,"col":4}')
Bash(curl -sS -b cookie.txt -c cookie.txt -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8765/api/action -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"kind":"fire","row":3,"col":3}')

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command 'Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8765 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }')
